author: mbluj
body:
#### PR description:

This PR introduces two fixes for decay-mode information (status) in gen-tau:
* Synchronise the decay-mode codes (status) stored in gen-tau-jets, which are used in MiniAOD, and gen-vis-taus, which are used in NanoAOD. The decay modes that were incorrectly assigned as "null" (-1) in the former collection are now assigned as "rare" (15), which is consistent with the latter collection;
* Change the treatment of tau decays with ee pairs (predominantly from pi0 -> gamma(ee) decays with B ~1.2%), which were classified as "rare" and now contribute to decay modes with pi0s, counting the ee pairs as photons.

The first change is only visible at MiniAOD (migration of the gen-tau-jets status from -1 to 15), while the second gives rise to an increase in the gen-vis-tau status (`GenVisTau_status`) of 1, 2 and 11 by 12% (as expected), and a decrease in status 15.

#### PR validation:

Validated with Summer24 miniAOD and nanoAOD workflows.
title: fix gen-tau decay-modes
